strong_signals: Interested in cricket (recent posts and comments)
Works in SaaS sales leadership (VP Sales, GTM)
Engages with revenue leadership and team building content
weak_signals: May appreciate executive gift hampers or leadership-themed items
Premium coffee or gourmet hampers as universal corporate gifts
signals_to_avoid: Do not infer religion, politics, health, family status, or ethnicity

recommended_gifts.why_this_gift: Directly ties to Aarav's visible cricket passion from LinkedIn posts and comments, within budget.
recommended_gifts.personalisation_reasoning: Strong signal: cricket posts ('India vs Australia match') and comment ('Cricket teaches leadership').
recommended_gifts.personalised_message: Aarav — still thinking about your India vs Australia post. Hope this miniature bat is a fun nod to the leadership lessons you find on the pitch. Thanks again for the discovery call last week.
assumptions: Cricket interest inferred from recent posts and engaged topics

recommended_gifts.why_this_gift: Premium cricket memorabilia suited to a VP-level thank-you gift.

recommended_gifts.personalised_message: Your comment about cricket and leadership stuck with me — this felt like the right way to say thank you after our call.
assumptions: Sports memorabilia is appropriate for prospective customer relationship
